Hero.description: Fullstack Developer & AI Integrator. I build modern web and powerful intelligent systems. Based in Padang, Indonesia.

About.title: About Me
About.description: I am a Fullstack Developer with a passion for building impactful digital products. From beautiful interfaces to robust backends, I handle it all — including AI integration and data analytics.

Projects.title: Selected Projects
Projects.description: A collection of projects where I experiment with the latest technologies, smooth interactions, and modern design.
Projects.p1_desc: Business landing page with smooth animations, fully responsive, and SEO optimized.
Projects.p2_desc: Complete cashier application: product management, transactions, reports, and multi-user login.
Projects.p4_desc: AI assistant for farmers — answers questions about pests, weather, and farming techniques.
Projects.p5_desc: Complete online shopping platform with shopping cart, checkout, and admin dashboard.
Projects.p6_desc: Interactive Python-based analytics dashboard for monitoring and business data visualization.

Contact.description: Available for freelance projects. Contact me if you want to discuss design, technology, or other ideas.
